name: Seafood Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small amount of oil in two skillets.
2. In one pan, sauté shrimp, parsley, and garlic until the shrimp turn pink. Do not overcook.
3. Keep stock heating on the stove.
4. In the second skillet, add onions and cook until translucent.
5. Add rice to the onions and stir until lightly browned.
6. Gradually add hot broth, white wine, and lemon juice to the rice.
7. Cook until the liquid is absorbed. Continue adding hot broth in batches until the rice is cooked.
8. Mix the cooked rice with the shrimp.
9. Serve with a sprinkle of Parmesan.
